fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number of this item.

fields.name: Service Item Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the service item group associated with this item.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of this item.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the service item.

fields.name: Priority
fields.tooltip: Specifies the service priority for this item.

fields.name: Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer who owns this item.

fields.name: Ship-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for an alternate shipment address if you want to ship to another address than the one that has been entered automatically. This field is also used in case of drop shipment.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number linked to the service item.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Location of Service Item
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the location of this item.

fields.name: Sales Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit price of this item when it was sold.

fields.name: Sales Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit cost of this item when it was sold.

fields.name: Warranty Starting Date (Labor)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date of the labor warranty for this item.

fields.name: Warranty Ending Date (Labor)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending date of the labor warranty for this item.

fields.name: Warranty Starting Date (Parts)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date of the spare parts warranty for this item.

fields.name: Warranty Ending Date (Parts)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending date of the spare parts warranty for this item.

fields.name: Warranty % (Parts)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of spare parts costs covered by the warranty for the item.

fields.name: Warranty % (Labor)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of labor costs covered by the warranty for this item.

fields.name: Response Time (Hours)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the estimated number of hours this item requires before service on it should be started.

fields.name: Installation Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when this item was installed at the customer's site.

fields.name: Sales Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when this item was sold.

fields.name: Last Service Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the last service on this item.

fields.name: Default Contract Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the default contract value of an item that later will be included in a service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Default Contract Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies a default contract discount percentage for an item, if this item will be part of a service contract.

fields.name: Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor for this item.

fields.name: Vendor Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number that the vendor uses for this item.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the service item is blocked from being used in service contracts or used and posted in transactions via service documents, except credit memos.

fields.name: Item Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the item that the service item is linked to.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer who owns this item.

fields.name: Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the customer who owns this item.

fields.name: Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the customer address.

fields.name: Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person you regularly contact when you do business with the customer who owns this item.

fields.name: Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer phone number.

fields.name: Ship-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the ship-to address, in case it is a long address.

fields.name: Ship-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the phone number at address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Vendor Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor name for this item.

fields.name: Vendor Item Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name assigned to this item by the vendor.

fields.name: Service Item Components
fields.tooltip: Specifies that there is a component for this service item.

fields.name: Preferred Resource
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the resource that the customer prefers for servicing of the item.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: Ship-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Service Price Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the Service Price Group associated with this item.

fields.name: Default Contract Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the default contract cost of a service item that later will be included in a service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Search Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies an alternate description to search for the service item.

fields.name: Service Contracts
fields.tooltip: Specifies that this service item is associated with one or more service contracts/quotes.
